pi_items.source: Confirmed via setup_task.sh and export_result.sh which explicitly create, manipulate, and archive this specific directory.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a complete SUMO highway on-ramp merge scenario from scratch in the directory /home/ga/SUMO_Output/highway_merge. The agent is not provided with any external dataset or input files, so all data and configuration files are synthetic and must be generated by the agent.
